name: 1337scout
description: A discipline-first Claude Code .claude/ kit: /scout diagnoses your task and routes by purpose (not a hardcoded table); a self-governing 13-axiom discipline method keeps work honest; non-editing verifier agents (Edit/destructive-Bash denied) and a deterministic safety floor (blocks destructive commands & secret-writes, 47/47 caught, 0 FP) sit beneath. Scaffolds in via npx 1337scout.
